calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Cetera Investment Services Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CETERA INVESTMENT SERVICES LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
